title: populus alba var. bachofenii
intro: Populus alba var. bachofenii, also known as the White Poplar, is a deciduous tree species native to Central Asia. The bark of this plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The White Poplar has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Populus alba var. bachofenii bark can be made into a decoction or infused in water to create a tea that is used to harness its medicinal properties.
